scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ace/shared && npm run build --workspace @ace/backend && npm run build --workspace @ace/frontend && npm run build --workspace @ace/runner
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ace/shared && npm run lint --workspace @ace/backend && npm run lint --workspace @ace/frontend && npm run lint --workspace @ace/runner
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ace/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @ace/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @ace/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace @ace/runner
